_note: EXPECTED OUTPUT for the malicious_release scenario under ENTERPRISE policy (target 0.90). Unit-test the full pipeline against this. Flow: gate=investigate -> RepoDoctor healthy + VERIS high_risk -> disagreement, confidence 0.60 < 0.90 -> escalate ($0.03) -> resolves to high_risk -> DO_NOT_SHIP 0.94. Total spend 0.14.

event.detail: postinstall exfiltrating env vars added in 2.4.1

gate.reason: critical severity on a production dependency

escalation.reason: health/trust disagreement; confidence 0.60 < policy target 0.90; budget remaining $0.14

disagreement: Repo Doctor sees an active, well-tested repo (healthy); VERIS flags an ownership change and a postinstall added in 2.4.1 (high risk). Escalation confirmed the postinstall is malicious.
